title: ESC COVID-19 Mandated Closure Extended Until January 21
excerpt: Under the extended COVID-19 AHS guidelines, the Edmonton Squash Club will remain closed until at least January 21st. We expect that an update will be issued several days prior to that, and we will acting on new guidance as appropriate. Club Closed membership fees are in effect currently. For any questions and concerns, please contact … Read more
content:
Under the extended COVID-19 AHS guidelines, the Edmonton Squash Club will remain closed until at least January 21st. We expect that an update will be issued several days prior to that, and we will acting on new guidance as appropriate.

Club Closed membership fees are in effect currently. For any questions and concerns, please contact us by phone or by email and we will respond as quickly as possible.
